results.title: DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth - NAV, Mutual Fund Performance & Portfolio
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > ### About DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth
Content:
DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by DSP Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 16 Dec 1996. Kaivalya Nadkarni is the Current Fund Manager of DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹2,30,322 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 27 Mar 2026 is ₹31.89.
The DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. ;

results.title: MF Tracker: Can this international fund which gave 13% return last month sustain momentum? - The Economic Times
excerpts: Section Title: MF Tracker: Can this international fund which gave 13% return last month sustain momentum? Content: DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF topped September 2025 with a 13.15% return, driven by its heavy exposure to gold and copper mining companies. The fund benefited from the commodities upcycle, particularly precious metals, despite unrated status by major agencies. Experts suggest emerging markets offer better diversification than developed ones. ETMarkets.com DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF led equity funds in September 2025 with a 13.15% return. ... Section Title: ... > How does an expert analyse the performance? Content: DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF is an open ended fund of fund scheme investing in overseas funds and/or ETFs investing in securities of companies involved in mining and metals whose predominant economic activity is the production of metals and industrial minerals. The primary investment objective of the scheme is to seek capital appreciation by investing in units of overseas funds and/or ETFs investing in securities of companies involved in mining and metals whose predominant economic activity is the production of metals and industrial minerals. The performance of the fund is benchmarked against MSCI ACWI Metals and Mining 30% Buffer 10/40 (1994) Net Total Return Index and is managed by Kaivalya Nadkarni. ... Section Title: ... > How does an expert analyse the performance? Content: Considering the DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF, there are around 31 international funds that have completed five years of existence in the market, of which Motilal Oswal Nasdaq 100 FoF has offered the highest return of around 23.93% in the last five years. PGIM India Emerging Markets Equity gave the lowest return of around 4.12% in the last five years. Post witnessing the performance of international funds, should one go via SIP or lumpsum and what is the way ahead for the international funds? According to Shinde, given the volatility in global markets and currency movements, SIPs are a prudent route for investors looking to average costs and those with higher risk appetite may consider staggered lumpsum investments on corrections. One should always consider risk appetite, investment horizon, and goals before making any investment decisions. ... Section Title: ... > How does an expert analyse the performance? Content: [dsp mutual fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/dsp-mutual-fund/mutual_funds_search/amcid-181.cms) international fund dsp world mining overseas equity omni fof valueresearch dsp world mining wheaton precious metals [small cap fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mf/small-cap-mutual-funds) etmutualfunds newmont corporation [maruti suzuki](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/maruti-suzuki-india-ltd/stocks/companyid-11890.cms) (Catch all the Mutual Fund News , Breaking News , Budget 2024 Events and Latest News Updates on The Economic Times .) Section Title: DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan > ... > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
6
More Details
About DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan
DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan is a equity mutual fund scheme of DSP Mutual Fund. Launched on January 03, 2013, it is currently managed by Kaivalya Nadkarni. The fund has an expense ratio of 1.67% with an overall AUM (Assets Under Management) of ₹154 Cr.
DSP World Mining Fund of Fund - Direct Plan invests mainly in the shares of foreign companies listed outside India. Being a fund of funds, it invests its assets in a set of mutual fund schemes instead of the underlying securities directly. The fund allows minimum lumpsum investment of ₹100 and minimum SIP of ₹100.
Investment Strategy
The fund would predominantly invest in units of BlackRock Global Funds - World Mining Fund. In addition to this, a significant part of its corpus would be invested in units of other similar overseas mutual fund schemes.
 ...

The minimum investment required to start investing in DSP World Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Direct Plan is ₹100 for the lump sum option and ₹100 for the SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) option.
